title: exocarpos odoratus
intro: Exocarpos odoratus, also known as the native bear or native bear bush, is a small tree or shrub native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues. Exocarpos odoratus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a valuable resource in natural remedies.
